subject: Merge single and batch AVC consumers to minimise duplicated code
commit_message:
Merge single and batch AVC consumers to minimise duplicated code

	- Removed @Qualifier from field declarations in EventProducer
	since they are already specified on the constructor parameters
	where Spring actually resolves the beans.
	Field-level qualifiers were redundant.

Issue-ID: CPS-3221
Change-Id: Ie290d0a6e1dc5056200cfe149d7e82e32d70adb7
Signed-off-by: emaclee <lee.anjella.macabuhay@est.tech>
